title: Pleurothallis beyrodtiana

The species Pleurothallis beyrodtiana is native to South America and is typically found in tropical regions with high humidity and warm temperatures. The classification of Pleurothallis beyrodtiana reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Orchidaceae family.
